UI_QuickFits_tooltip_wear: Tochno privodit vashe nadetoe snaryazhenie k etomu komplektu, snimaya vse lishnee pered etim.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_add: Nadevaet etot komplekt poverkh togo, chto uzhe nadeto, zamenyaya tolko konfliktuyushchie sloty.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_take_off: Snimaet tolko veshchi iz etogo komplekta i kladet ikh v inventar.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_place_container: Peremeshchaet predmety komplekta v konteiner, snachala v vybrannyi, zatem v blizhaishii.
UI_QuickFits_drop_hint_capture: ili ispolzuyte Zahvat Nadetogo, chtoby vzyat tekushchee snaryazhenie
UI_QuickFits_drop_hint_release: Otpustite, chtoby dobavit peretashchennye nosimye predmety
UI_QuickFits_result_apply_failed: Quick Fits ne smog primenit vybrannyi komplekt.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_wearable_duplic: Dobavlyat mozhno tolko nosimye predmety, peretashchennye dublikaty byli proignorirovany.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_wearable_dupl: Syuda otnosyatsya tolko nosimye predmety. Dublikaty proignorirovany.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_only_wearable: V Quick Fit mozhno dobavlyat tolko nosimye predmety.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_only_wearable: V komplekt mozhno brosat tolko nosimye predmety.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_already_present: Eti predmety uzhe est v etom Quick Fit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_already_prese: Etot nosimyi predmet uzhe est v etom komplekte.
UI_QuickFits_status_captured_current: Tekushchie nadetye predmety igroka skopirovany v redaktor.
UI_QuickFits_status_new_draft: Nachat novyi pustoi chernovik komplekta. Peretashchite nosimye predmety ili ispolzuite Zahvat Nadetogo.
UI_QuickFits_status_delete_failed: Quick Fits ne smog udalit vybrannyi komplekt.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_wear: Vyberite komplekt pered tem kak nadet ego.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_place: Vyberite komplekt pered peremeshcheniem v konteiner.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_remove: Vyberite komplekt pered tem kak snyat ego.
UI_QuickFits_error_no_container: Dlya Quick Fits net vybrannogo ili blizhaishego konteinera.
UI_QuickFits_error_save_empty: Vyberite khotya by odin nadetyi predmet, chtoby sokhranit etot komplekt.
